## Root Cause Summary

We are trying to reset a STATUS register with specific bit, and we are not seen that register goes to 0 when we assert the reset bit.

The status register we are trying to reset is:

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_ovuv_hi_status.show().

and the reset bit is:

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_hi_config.pmax_hi_status_reset.write(1)

A way to reproduce this scenario is making trigger the OV and UV, so for this we need to set the next registers.

#sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pm

## Raw HSD Text

<!-- This section provides raw HSD data for agent enrichment (Stage 3b). -->
<!-- The Copilot agent extracts root cause, fix description, code refs, and diagrams. -->

### Description
We are trying to reset a STATUS register with specific bit, and we are not seen that register goes to 0 when we assert the reset bit.

The status register we are trying to reset is:

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_ovuv_hi_status.show().

and the reset bit is:

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_hi_config.pmax_hi_status_reset.write(1)

A way to reproduce this scenario is making trigger the OV and UV, so for this we need to set the next registers.

#sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_hi_config.pmax_hi_status_reset.write(1)

#Enable the feature.

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_config.lock.write(1)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_control.pmax_en.write(1)

#We change dac code for UV to force to trigger the Voltage. We change the sweep the dac codes 3 times. 

#With this the counts on UV should increase in the Status Register.

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_control.pmax_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0xff)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_control.pmax_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0x00)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_control.pmax_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0xff)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_control.pmax_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0x00)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_control.pmax_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0xff)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_control.pmax_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0x00)

#We change dac code for OV to force to trigger the Voltage. We change the sweep the dac codes 3 times. 

#With this the counts on OV should increase in the Status Register.

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_debug_0.pmax_l1_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0xFF)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_debug_0.pmax_l1_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0x00)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_debug_0.pmax_l1_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0xFF)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_debug_0.pmax_l1_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0x00)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_debug_0.pmax_l1_dac0_hvm_codes.write(0xFF)

sv.socket0.cbb0.base.fdp.pmax_reg.pmax_debug_0.pmax_l1_dac0_hvm_c
